result.stdout:
Description:

Usage:
  GCore.Source.JsonClassGenerator.Cli [options]

Options:
  --json <json>                                        json [default: [stdin]]
  --write <write>                                      write [default: [stdout]]
  --lang <CSharp|Java|Php|Sql|TypeScript|VisualBasic>  lang [default: CSharp]
  --main-class <main-class>                            MainClass [default: Root]
  --namespace <namespace>                              Namespace []
  --secondary-namespace <secondary-namespace>          SecondaryNamespace []
  --internal-visibility                                InternalVisibility [default: False]
  --explicit-deserialization                           ExplicitDeserialization [default: False]
  --use-nested-classes                                 UseNestedClasses [default: False]
  --apply-obfuscation-attributes                       ApplyObfuscationAttributes [default: False]
  --examples-in-documentation                          ExamplesInDocumentation [default: False]
  --use-pascal-case                                    UsePascalCase [default: False]
  --use-properties                                     UseProperties [default: False]
  --property-attribute <property-attribute>            PropertyAttribute []
  --version                                            Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                                       Show help and usage information
